Name: MAP_OBJECT_DOOR_PARAM
Description: Defines behavior, interaction types, and UI key guide settings for map doors.

Fields.Name: Door Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the type or behavior category of the door (e.g., sliding, swinging, locked, etc.).

Fields.Name: Open Interaction Key Guide Parameter ID
Fields.Description: ID of the key guide parameter displayed when interacting with the door to open it.

Fields.Name: Close Interaction Key Guide Parameter ID
Fields.Description: ID of the key guide parameter displayed when interacting with the door to close it.
